description_long: This kiosk features a rectangular, boxy structure with a flat, concrete-like roof that slightly overhangs the main body. The front side is dominated by a large, dark window or service opening, possibly for customer interaction, flanked by solid panels. The side views reveal a mix of solid and transparent sections, with some orange accent details suggesting trim or framing. The rear is mostly solid, with minimal detailing and a continuation of the overhanging roof. A smaller, detached cuboid structure sits adjacent to the main kiosk, possibly serving as a storage unit or auxiliary booth. The overall design is utilitarian and modern, with a focus on functionality and clean lines.
description: A modern, rectangular kiosk with a flat overhanging roof, large front window, and a small adjacent cuboid unit. The design is clean, functional, and features gray, white, and black tones with orange accents.
description_view_0: Front view shows the main kiosk with a large dark window or service opening and a solid base, with the smaller cuboid unit to the right.
description_view_1: Side view reveals a mix of solid and transparent panels, orange trim, and the depth of the overhanging roof; the small cuboid is seen from the side.
description_view_2: Rear view displays a mostly solid surface with minimal detailing and the overhanging roof, both main kiosk and cuboid visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view highlights the orange trim, side paneling, and the open face of the small cuboid unit.
attribute_window_presence: one large rectangular window at the front
attribute_door_configuration: one single door, likely on the side or rear (not clearly visible)
attribute_roof_design: flat roof with slight overhang, concrete-like material, no visible decorative elements
